concerns.text: FR-002 mandates '8-bit quantization (load_in_8bit=True) if available'. The plan (Section 'Compute Feasibility') explicitly states 'No 8-bit quantization on CPU' and plans to degrade to float16. While the plan handles the fallback, it does not explicitly confirm that the implementation will attempt the 8-bit path first as required by the spec, or if it will skip directly to float16. This creates a gap in satisfying the 'MUST use... if available' constraint.

FR-004 requires 'Tobit regression (or Kaplan-Meier estimator)'. The plan (Section 'Statistical Rigor') mentions 'Tobit regression' and 'Wilcoxon' but omits any mention of the 'Kaplan-Meier estimator' as a fallback option. The plan must explicitly address the Kaplan-Meier alternative to fully cover the requirement.

SC-004 requires measuring effect size against 'Cohen's d benchmarks (small, medium, and large)'. The plan (Section 'Statistical Rigor') mentions calculating 'Cohen's d' but does not state that the report will explicitly compare the result against the standard benchmarks (0.2, 0.5, 0.8) to categorize the magnitude. The plan needs to include this interpretation step to satisfy the success criterion.
